titleStmt.title: SII 19.291: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 291. (A.R. No. 491 of 1930.) VAḶAPPŪRNĀḌU, NAMAKKAL TALUK, SALEM DISTRICT. ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE, ARAPPAḶĪŚVARA TEMPLE.

summary.p: This records a decision (probably of the temple authorities), fixing a recurring (annual) payment of a kaḻanju of gold as remuneration to four persons, for conducting the three daily services in the temple of Tiruvaṟappaḷḷi-Uḍaiyār with twelve naḻi of rice by the standard measure Tiruveḷḷaṟai-kāṇam, derived from the (temple) land situated at Veruṇūr. This might be referred to the reign of Uttama-Chōḷa.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī kopparakecaripanmaṟku yāṇṭu patinoṉṟāvatu tiruvaṟappaḷḷiyuṭaiyārkku
tiruveḷḷaṟaik kāṇattāl sandhi yorovo
nṟukku tiruvamurtarici nānāḻiyāka sandhi munṟukku Arici panniru nāḻikkum ve
ruṇūril nilaṅkoṇṭu ceytu varukiṟa māṇikaḷ nālvaṟkku Iṭum
pon kaḻañcum cantrātittavaṟ celuttuvatākavum .
Digital edition of SII 19.291 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
